title: Remove SME agenda item ID links
description:
Implementation task for story plx-ce9b7c.

Scope:
- Locate SME agenda prompts or post-processing that permit Markdown item links.
- Ensure agenda output uses plain item IDs such as `Item 308411774`, not `[Item 308411774](...)`.
- Preserve the current question wording, examples, options, and impact format.
- Add or update focused tests/specs for this behavior.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implemented SME agenda item-ID link flattening in feedback_alignment_optimizer.yaml. Added prompt instructions for cycle and end-of-run SME agendas, plus a deterministic strip_sme_item_id_links post-processor after raw and rubric-memory-gated agenda generation. Focused config tests pass: pytest plexus/cli/procedure/test_feedback_alignment_optimizer_config.py -q (36 passed).
